zh.Coggeshall, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可可格沙拉爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Sharpe於大約1439年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親John Sharpe41歲，母親Jane Staunton35歲。他於大約1469年與Mrs Christopher Sharpe在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年享年34歲。

zh-hans.Coggeshall, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可可格沙拉爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Sharpe于大约1439年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲John Sharpe41岁，母亲Jane Staunton35岁。他于大约1469年与Mrs Christopher Sharpe在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sharpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sharp
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English sharp(e) ‘sharp, quick, smart, acute, keen-witted’ (Old English scearp).
Irish: when not the English or Scots name in 1 above, an Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Géaráin ‘descendant of Géarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of géar ‘sharp’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Scharf   ‘sharp-cutting’ or of any of several other European names with similar meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Sharpe was born about 1439, in Essex, England, his father, John Sharpe, was 41 and his mother, Jane Staunton, was 35. He married Mrs Christopher Sharpe about 1469, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1472, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Sharpe est né environ 1439, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Sharpe, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Jane Staunton, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Christopher Sharpe environ 1469, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1472, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Sharpe um 1439 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sharpe 41 und seine Mutter Jane Staunton 35. Er hat um 1469 in Essex, England Mrs Christopher Sharpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1472 im Alter von 34 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Sharpe è nato il circa 1439 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, John Sharpe, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Jane Staunton, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Christopher Sharpe circa 1469, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1472, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.Coggeshall, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスコグジェシャル
ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Sharpeが約1439年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父John Sharpeは41歳，母Jane Stauntonは35歳であった。約1469年にイギリスエセックスでMrs Christopher Sharpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年に34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Sharpe(이)가 대략 1439년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sharpe(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Staunton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1469년 영국 에세스에서 Mrs Christopher Sharpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Coggeshall, Essex, England: Coggeshall, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Sharpe nasceu aproximadamente 1439, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sharpe, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Jane Staunton, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Christopher Sharpe aproximadamente 1469, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1472, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Sharpe родился около 1439 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Sharpe было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Staunton, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Christopher Sharpe около 1469 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1472 г. в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher Sharpe nació aproximadamente 1439, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sharpe, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Jane Staunton, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Mrs Christopher Sharpe aproximadamente 1469, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1472, a la edad de 34 años.
